title: Sommer Harris - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Sommer Harris - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Sommer Harris
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’22
Vancouver Campus
Sommer Harris thought it was too late for her to pursue a career in tech. In Khoury College’s Align program, however, the supportive community of staff, faculty, and students helped her push through the challenges of entering a field she never thought she could access.
It was kind of unimaginable to me, getting a computer science co-op and then eventually getting a full-time job. But it does happen, and if you keep working and take advantage of the resources, it will happen
Sommer Harris, Align MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury Stories
